name: SHINTO Holdings, Inc.
summary: SHINTO Holdings, Inc. engages in the wholesale of apparel in Japan. The company is also involved in the underwear, uniform, trading, and brand licensing business, as well as offers beauty serum face mask products. In addition, it engages in the purchase, sale, and management of real estate properties; and provides real estate services, including concierge, property information, delivery, and tax consultation. The company serves specialty stores, mass retailers, sports mass retailers, etc. It offers its products under the Modern Amusement, RUSS-K, and CONART brands. The company was formerly known as Crymson Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Shinto Holdings, Inc. in October 2017. Shinto Holdings, Inc. was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
